prompt:
Cute comic illustration style. Clean outlines. Warm, slightly saturated colors.
NOT photorealistic. Characters have large expressive eyes, soft rounded shapes,
consistent line weight. No text, no watermarks, no logos. Clean composition.

Reproduce the reference image (osaka-v3-approved.png) EXACTLY. Same composition, same poses, same background, same colors, same lighting, same everything.

Make ONLY this one change to the outlines:

- The outline strokes around the characters' BODIES, FUR, EARS, TAIL, LIMBS, and CLOTHING must be the same dark maroon/dark reddish-brown color as seen on the 360-degree turn reference sheets. This is a warm dark maroon, not pure black.
- EXCEPTION: the lines forming the EYES (pupils, irises, eyelids), NOSE, and MOUTH must remain pure solid BLACK.

So: body outlines = dark maroon. Eyes, nose, mouth lines = black. Exactly as in the 360-degree turn sheets.

Do not change anything else. Same scene, same characters, same poses, same background.
